description: Default-private LinkedIn profile editing and messaging workflows through local change packets and explicit-send safeguards.

novel_features.name: Default-private LinkedIn profile packets
novel_features.description: Profile edits default to not notifying the network; notifying requires --notify-network plus explicit confirmation.

novel_features.name: Draft-first LinkedIn messaging
novel_features.description: Messages are stored locally as drafts and require an explicit confirmation command before sending.
